teamsPage.title: Gareewwan & baay'ina
teamsPage.description: Garee showroom ykn dirqama uumaa, rep dabalaa, fi garee jalqabaa murteessi akka safuu piipilaayinii fi gurgurta Quick Add sirree ta'an.
teamsPage.removeConfirm: {name} garee {team} irraa haquu? Booda ammas dabalamuu danda'u.
teamsPage.deleteTeamConfirm: Garee "{name}" guutuu ni haqa? Miseensonni garee kana irraa haquu; galmeen gurgurtaa garee kana irratti team_id ni qufa. Kun deebi'uu hin danda'amu.
